subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The Wronged One of the world hath turned toward thee from this Most Great Prison and hath willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر مظلوم عالم در این سجن اعظم بتو توجه نموده و اراده فرموده
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
